title: Frontend Developer
description: We are looking for a skilled Frontend Developer to join our team. You will be responsible for building user-facing web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks. Experience with React, HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design is required.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Join our creative team as a UI/UX Designer. You'll create intuitive and visually appealing user interfaces for web and mobile applications. Proficiency in Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, and user research methodologies is essential.

title: Backend Developer
description: We need a Backend Developer to build and maintain server-side applications. Experience with Node.js, Python, databases, and API development is required. You'll work on scalable systems that handle millions of requests.

title: Marketing Specialist
description: Looking for a Marketing Specialist to develop and execute marketing campaigns. Experience with digital marketing, social media, content creation, and analytics tools is preferred. Help us grow our brand presence.

title: Data Analyst
description: Join our data team as a Data Analyst. You'll analyze large datasets to provide business insights and create reports. Strong skills in SQL, Python, Excel, and data visualization tools like Tableau are required.

title: Project Manager
description: We're seeking an experienced Project Manager to lead cross-functional teams and deliver projects on time. PMP certification preferred. You'll coordinate resources, manage timelines, and ensure project success.
